chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1075 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 21.11.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel a/w S.F Rahoo o/b of respondent No.3 SSP Badin and respondent No.4 SHO Golarchi. = On last date of hearing as an indulgence a week’s time was granted to comply with the office objection. Today, the private respondents have appeared alongwith their Counsel Mr. Sulleman Dahri, who submits that primarily the dispute between the petitioner and private respondents is with regard to a piece of lad and the same was subject matter of a civil suit, which was dismissed subsequently. Copy of the plaint is available at Page-13 of the petition but no decision has been placed on record. Today, the learned State Counsel has filed his parawise comments, in which it has been mentioned that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner. This petition is disposed of with the directions that petitioner should not be harassed by respondents and even if the private respondents have any grievance against the petitioner, the same can be redressed through due process of law but not otherwise. JUDGE Shahid
